message:
test(analysis): improve coverage for history and brief modules

Add 6 edge case tests for history (empty input, limit=0, limit
truncation, nonexistent filter ID, closed-without-closed_at fallback,
sort-by-id ordering) and 4 for brief (empty recommendations/blockers,
issue counts, escape_md_table, truncate boundary).

Closes bd-jnm6.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
